prerequisites: A ShopWired store account with API access, since the connector requires an api_key and api_secret credential pair.
An API key value to populate the required api_key field.
An API secret value to populate the required api_secret field.
A start_date value marking the earliest point in time from which the connector should begin syncing records.

authMethods.name: API key and secret
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a key/secret credential pair, supplied through the required secret fields api_key and api_secret. Provide both values from your ShopWired store to authorize API requests.

setupSteps.title: Obtain ShopWired API credentials
setupSteps.body: Acquire the api_key and api_secret values for your ShopWired store. Both are required secret fields used to authenticate the connector.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the required fields
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_key and api_secret into their respective secret fields, then set start_date to the earliest date from which records should be synced. All three fields are required.
